channel.title: Advances in Calculus of Variations
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Advances in Calculus of Variations

item.title: Γ-convergence analysis of the nonlinear self-energy induced by edge dislocations in semi-discrete and discrete models in two dimensions
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0053

item.title: Characterization of the subdifferential and minimizers for the anisotropic p-capacity
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0057

item.title: The best approximation of a given function in L 2-norm by Lipschitz functions with gradient constraint
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0058

item.title: Quantitative C 1-stability of spheres in rank one symmetric spaces of non-compact type
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0062

item.title: The Yang–Mills–Higgs functional on complex line bundles: Asymptotics for critical points
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0064

item.title: A sub-Riemannian maximum modulus theorem
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0066

item.title: The least gradient problem with Dirichlet and Neumann boundary conditions
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0067

item.title: The 2+1-convex hull of a~finite set
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0077

item.title: Non-local BV functions and a denoising model with L 1 fidelity
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0082

item.title: Avoidance of the Lavrentiev gap for one-dimensional non-autonomous functionals with constraints
item.description: Article by Carlo Mariconda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/acv-2023-0096
